Why Arik

Built, broken, and rebuilt.

Arik isn't a strategist who talks. He's a founder who's built, broken, and rebuilt — and he uses that scar tissue to find what you can't see in your own business.

No-Bullshit Talker

No vague frameworks. No polite hedging. If your plan has a hole, you'll know in the first 10 minutes.

All-Rounder

He won't tell you it's a marketing problem when it's actually your pricing. He sees the whole board.

Visual Thinker

He maps your business live, in front of you — so the blind spots become impossible to ignore, even for you.

Hands-On Builder

He doesn't diagnose and disappear. He stays until the plan actually runs.

See packages
How it works

Two ways to work together

01 — Co-creation workshops

Think together, live

You explain your business. Arik maps it live on a shared board — connecting the dots you've been too close to see. Then you solve it together.

02 — On-call support

Unblock in real time

Between sessions, message Arik directly when you hit a wall. No waiting for the next meeting to unblock a decision.
